location: A 2% drop from curved-sword or axe-wielding Second-Generation Albinauric enemies. The most reliable spawn is a trio of shield-wielding Albinaurics on/around a ruined church cluster northwest of Academy Gate Town in Liurnia of the Lakes; more of the same enemy type (and shield) appear later around Ordina, Liturgical Town in Consecrated Snowfield.
tactics: Look for the trio of shield-wielding Albinaurics on the sunken church ruins northwest of Academy Gate Town.
Only curved-sword/axe-wielding Second-Generation Albinaurics drop this shield — the blood-red Albinaurics inside Mohgwyn Dynasty Mausoleum do not.
2% is a low drop rate, so expect to rest at a nearby grace and repeat several kills.
The same enemy type reappears near Ordina in Consecrated Snowfield later in the game if you'd rather farm there instead.
lore: A tall oval metal shield carried by young Albinaurics, its ornamentation representing the primordial dewdrop from which their kind is said to have sprung.

builds.name: Anti-magic Strength tank
builds.why: Plain D-scaling Strength shield, but its unusually high 66% magic negation makes it a strong pick against sorcery-heavy enemies and bosses.
